description: A union representative has filed a grievance on behalf of an employee, alleging a violation of the collective bargaining agreement (CBA).

nodes.task_description: Receive the formal grievance and log it in the labor relations case management system.

expected_outcome.expected: The labor relations specialist creates a new case for the grievance.

nodes.task_description: Review the specific CBA article cited in the grievance.

expected_outcome.expected: Specialist reviews the CBA to understand the alleged violation.

nodes.task_description: Schedule a grievance hearing with the union representative, the employee, and management to discuss the issue.

expected_outcome.expected: Specialist schedules the formal hearing as required by the CBA.
